footer.brand: A modern Minecraft launcher designed to be lightweight, fast and accessible. Run the game without compromising performance, even on resource-limited machines.
footer.copyright: © {year} CubicLauncher. Open source under GPLv3. Not affiliated with Mojang AB.

hero.title: CUBIC LAUNCHER.
hero.description: A free, open-source Minecraft launcher built for performance. Manage multiple instances, mods and configurations through a clear, unified interface.

home.feature1Desc: Create and manage multiple Minecraft instances with different versions, mods and configurations, all from one place.
home.feature2Desc: Fully open source. Audit, modify and contribute to the project on GitHub.
home.feature3Desc: Supports Premium, NoPremium and Ely.by accounts. Manage multiple profiles securely and switch between sessions without complications.
home.feature4Desc: Built to use the fewest resources possible, ensuring a stable experience even on lower-end hardware.
home.feature5Desc: Adjust launcher behavior and Minecraft parameters to match your needs.
home.feature6Desc: Manage mods, modloaders, texture packs and logs directly from the launcher interface.
home.feature7Desc: CubicLauncher is an original project built from scratch, without relying on code from other launchers. Each component is designed for an optimized experience.
home.mission: CubicLauncher's mission is to provide a free, stable and accessible solution for accessing Minecraft. We prioritize performance, code transparency and user control, with support for Premium, NoPremium and Ely.by accounts, even on resource-limited machines.
home.valueSubtitle: A Minecraft launcher designed for performance, freedom and accessibility. No premium account required, no ads, and full user control.
home.value1Desc: No hidden fees or subscriptions. Available to download, use and modify without restrictions.
home.value2Desc: Engineered for low resource consumption and stable execution across different systems.
home.value3Desc: Available for Windows, Linux and macOS. The same experience on every operating system.
home.value4Desc: Adapt the launcher's appearance with community themes and configure every detail to your needs.
home.value5Desc: Developed from scratch without reusing code from other launchers. An original project focused on optimization.
home.quickStartSubtitle: Select your operating system, download the installer and launch CubicLauncher.

install.title: Install
install.subtitle: Choose your operating system and download the latest version.
install.lookingForOther: Looking for another version or architecture?

platforms.windowsReq: Windows 10 64-bit or later. 4GB RAM minimum recommended.
platforms.windowsStep2: Run the file. If Windows SmartScreen shows a warning, click 'More info' and then 'Run anyway'.
platforms.windowsStep4: Launch CubicLauncher from the Start menu.
platforms.linuxStep2: Right-click the downloaded file, select 'Properties', go to the 'Permissions' tab, and check 'Allow executing file as program'. Alternatively, run chmod +x cubiclauncher.AppImage in the terminal.
platforms.macosDesc: Universal application for Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3) and Intel processors.
platforms.macosStep2: Open the file and drag the CubicLauncher icon to the Applications folder.
platforms.macosStep3: The first time you open it, macOS may prevent it from running. Go to System Settings > Privacy & Security and click 'Open Anyway'.

themes.description: Explore and download themes created by the community.

page.homeDesc: CubicLauncher is an open-source, lightweight and customizable Minecraft launcher, supporting Premium, NoPremium and Ely.by accounts.
page.installDesc: Download CubicLauncher, the Minecraft launcher, and enjoy a fast, secure, feature-packed gaming experience.
page.themesDesc: Explore and download community-created themes to customize CubicLauncher.
